vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1294 (feat(packs): lessons-pack-0.1 pilot -- first tier-3 extension pack); scope finalized after #1283 design convergence and #1274 landing. Part of the #742 / #1284 decomposition.

plan.title: lessons-pack-0.1 pilot -- first tier-3 extension pack

narratives.Description: Stand up the first tier-3 extension pack end-to-end: migrate the framework's hand-authored meta/lessons.md into a structured lessons-pack-0.1 canonical source, regenerate meta/lessons.md from that source as a derivative projection (per ADR-001), and ship the task packs:slice surface so agents load only the lesson slice they query. Encodes the converged #1283 design: a single packs: namespace with the pack as an argument, a schema-declared slice registry using a constrained dotted-path + named-filter dialect (never JSONPath), slices that read the canonical source directly (never the rendered .md), text-default output with --json, --list discovery, three-state exit, and provenance on every result.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Add vbrief/schemas/lessons-pack.schema.json defining the pack id/version, the lesson-entry shape (id, title, date, issue_refs[], tags[], source, body markdown blob), and the named-slice registry (name -> {path, filters[]}). 2. Add a one-shot migration in scripts/pack_migrate_lessons.py that parses meta/lessons.md's 39 `## Title (date|#ref)` sections into packs/lessons/lessons-pack-0.1.json, extracting date/issue-refs and assigning tags from a small controlled vocabulary; commit the generated source. 3. Add scripts/pack_render.py that regenerates meta/lessons.md from the source with an ADR Layer-A provenance banner, then run it and commit the regenerated lessons.md as the new canonical projection. 4. Add scripts/packs_slice.py implementing `task packs:slice <pack> <name> [-- filters]`: load source, resolve the named slice via the schema registry, apply the fixed filter vocabulary (recent --since, by-tag --tag), emit text|json (text default) with pack/slice/source/source_sha provenance, --list, did-you-mean, three-state exit (0 ok / 2 usage). 5. Wire tasks/packs.yml (slice, render, verify-drift) into Taskfile.yml and add a drift gate task verify:pack-drift to the task check aggregate that fails when render output diverges from the committed lessons.md. 6. Add in-process tests in tests/cli/test_packs_slice.py and tests/cli/test_pack_render.py.
narratives.UserStory: As an agent loading lessons context, I want named, structured slice access to lessons by recency and tag, so that I pay only for the slice I query instead of loading the whole 100KB lessons file.
narratives.Traces: planRef #1294; epic #1284; decomposition_origin #742; design #1283; renderer/write-path #1274; tier-3 model #714; v2 follow-up #1637.

narrative.Acceptance: A migration creates packs/lessons/lessons-pack-0.1.json from the 39 meta/lessons.md sections, and the source validates against vbrief/schemas/lessons-pack.schema.json with each entry carrying date, issue_refs, tags, and a body blob.

items.title: Deterministic renderer makes lessons.md a projection

narrative.Acceptance: task packs:render regenerates meta/lessons.md from the canonical source with a provenance banner, and task verify:pack-drift fails when the rendered output diverges from the committed lessons.md.

items.title: task packs:slice surface with two slices

narrative.Acceptance: task packs:slice lessons recent --since and task packs:slice lessons by-tag --tag each return the filtered subset read from the canonical source, while --list displays the slice names and an unknown slice returns exit 2 with a did-you-mean suggestion.

Each slice emits text by default and json under --json, every result records pack/slice/source/source_sha provenance, and the resolver reads the canonical source directly rather than the rendered lessons.md.

expected_outputs: task packs:slice returns named slices read from the canonical source
task verify:pack-drift keeps lessons.md in sync with the structured source
